sections.subheading: Weed barrier, hardscape fabric, and geotextile are not interchangeable. DOTDAY makes three fabrics built for three jobs, shipped from the USA so your install holds up.

card.imageAlt: DOTDAY landscape fabric being installed on site

sections.heading: Match the fabric to the ground, not the price tag.
sections.intro: The wrong weight fails months later as weed pressure, shifting gravel, or drainage problems. Here is the right call for each job.

cards.title: Stronger gravel installs
cards.body: Stabilize gravel and stop sinking, shifting, and weed growth under driveways, paths, and high-traffic hardscape.
cards.alt: DOTDAY XBAR 5oz dual-layer fabric for gravel driveways and hardscape

cards.title: Cleaner garden beds
cards.body: Control weeds while water, air, and nutrients reach the soil. Built for beds, raised planters, farm rows, and nurseries.
cards.alt: DOTDAY SHIELD 3.2oz woven weed barrier fabric for garden beds and farm rows

cards.title: Better water management
cards.body: Improve drainage and limit soil erosion with high-permeability geotextile for French drains, retaining walls, and wet ground.
cards.alt: DOTDAY TERRA non-woven geotextile fabric for drainage and erosion control

sections.heading: Built for every application
sections.sub: Explore common uses and find the right DOTDAY fabric for your project.

apps.alt: DOTDAY SHIELD fabric laid across nursery plant rows

apps.title: Driveways & Gravel

apps.title: Walkways & Pathways
apps.body: Stable base under pavers, stone, or mulch.
apps.alt: DOTDAY XBAR fabric under a gravel walkway

apps.title: Drainage & Erosion
apps.body: Allows water to flow while preventing soil washout.
apps.alt: DOTDAY TERRA non-woven geotextile installed for drainage

sections.heading: Watch DOTDAY fabric on a real install.
sections.body: From roll-out to the finished surface, see how the right fabric goes down fast and lays flat. The same build pros rely on for beds, hardscape, and drainage, doing its job on site.
bullets: Cuts clean without fraying at the seams.
Permeable build lets water and air reach the soil.
UV-stabilized to hold up under mulch, gravel, and sun.

sections.heading: Professional installations that perform.
sections.intro: SHIELD, XBAR, and TERRA deliver engineered performance across hardscapes, gardens, and drainage. The right fabric for the ground, so the install holds up.

feature.title: Pristine Walkways
feature.body: XBAR 5oz dual-layer fabric keeps gravel and hardscape weed-free and stable. The woven face with a non-woven backing resists punctures and handles high-traffic installs.
feature.alt: Finished gravel pathway stabilized with DOTDAY XBAR hardscape fabric

side.title: Organized Beds
side.body: SHIELD woven fabric blocks weeds while water, air, and nutrients reach the soil. Built for beds, raised planters, and farm rows.
side.alt: Seedlings planted in even rows through DOTDAY SHIELD woven weed barrier

side.title: Soil Separation
side.body: TERRA non-woven geotextile separates soil from aggregate and lets water through. Engineered for French drains, retaining walls, and base stabilization.
side.alt: Worker rolling out DOTDAY TERRA non-woven geotextile fabric on a graded slope

stats.label: Faster installs
stats.sub: Clean-cutting fabric and high-visibility guide lines speed up every layout.

stats.label: Healthier plants
stats.sub: Permeable construction keeps moisture and nutrients moving to the root zone.

stats.label: Built to last
stats.sub: UV-stabilized fibers hold up under mulch, gravel, and full-sun exposure.

tools.title: FabricFinder™
tools.body: Answer a few questions about your ground condition and get matched to SHIELD, XBAR, or TERRA.

tools.title: Fabric Calculator
tools.body: Enter your area and get the exact roll count, with a 10% overlap buffer added automatically.

quotes.body: Used SHIELD 3.2oz across my garden beds. Blocks weeds completely, easy to install, and holding up well after six months under mulch.
quotes.name: Brooklyn

quotes.body: Installed SHIELD across our lavender rows. Controls weeds well, water flows through easily, and it held up through a full growing season.
quotes.name: Trevor M.

quotes.body: Using XBAR 5oz for gravel driveways and pathways. Strong, installs clean, and the base hasn't shifted at all.
quotes.name: Mike
